caribbean.headline: Caribbean Weather Update
caribbean.paragraph: Grenada is experiencing a 62% rain probability with winds of 13 kt and wave heights of 3.9 ft, while St. Thomas is seeing winds of 18 kt. I expect the less than 10% rain probability in other parts of the region to contribute to generally calm conditions, with the exception of these two ports which will see the most significant weather impacts today.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Seas Calm
mediterranean.paragraph: Marseille is experiencing 23 kt winds with 4.7 ft wave heights and less than 10% rain probability, while Cadiz has 18 kt winds, making for a relatively calm day in the Mediterranean, with Marseille being the top impact port due to its slightly higher wind speeds.
